# Disney Cruise Trivia
> The ultimate Disney cruise companion — trivia study, ship guides, dining reviews, venue details, and community wisdom for Disney Cruise Line.

## About
Disney Cruise Trivia is a free fan-made web app for Disney Cruise Line enthusiasts. It helps cruisers study trivia, discover onboard venues, plan their sailings, and share community knowledge.

## Content Areas

### Trivia
700+ trivia questions across 13 categories: Animation, Pixar, Star Wars, Marvel, Villains, Princesses, Music, Parks, Cruise, Walt History, Broadway, Food, Mixed.

### Cruise Guide (Secret Menu)
Comprehensive onboard guide covering:
- **Ships**: Disney Magic, Disney Wonder, Disney Dream, Disney Fantasy, Disney Wish, Disney Treasure, Disney Destiny, Disney Adventure
- **Venues**: 153 venue concepts across 8 ships (bars, lounges, pools, restaurants, theaters, youth clubs, and more)
- **Dining**: Rotational dining, specialty restaurants, quick service, bars & lounges
- **Activities**: Pools, water rides, sports, fitness, youth clubs, character experiences
- **Entertainment**: Live shows, deck parties, nightclubs
- **Shopping**: Onboard retail stores
- **Staterooms**: Room categories, deck plans, stateroom guides
- **Cruise Hacks**: Community-rated tips and insider knowledge

### Community Features
- Venue reviews with ratings
- Sailing reviews and logs
- Dining reviews
- Cruise hack submissions with verdicts (Must Try / Worth It / Skip It)
- First-Timer Guide for new cruisers
- Castaway Club Wisdom — tips organized by member level
- Community Q&A

### Guide Categories
Dining, Character Experiences, Live Shows & Entertainment, Deck Parties, Nightclubs & Lounges, Pools & Water, Sports & Recreation, Youth Clubs, Spa & Salon, Shops & Retail

## Sitemap
https://www.disneytrivia.club/sitemap.xml
